---
author: "Harvey"
title: "Building a Better Local LLM for Coding in R - Part 1"
date: "2026-05-25"
description: "Building a training set for a local LLM"
categories: ["AI", "R"]
draft: true
---

This is the first in a set of n posts on training a local LLM to be a better R programmer, particularly for the clinical setting.

This part deals with building a training set from existing R packages.
